description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test Workflow that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest with multiple Python versions (2, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8), setting up a SQL Server service. For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies including freetds-dev and requirements-dev.txt, build and install the package, run tests with pytest, and build a wheel.
